items.title: Celtic board reaction to fan fury at Tannadice that TV cameras missed as 'real anger' boils over

items.title: Callum McGregor in Celtic 'humble pie' admission after Dundee United loss

items.title: What does Celtic's latest loss mean for Scottish Premiership title race?
items.description: Perhaps Celtic losing to Dundee United shouldn't have been that surprising.  After all, there's only been one weekend in this astonishing Scottish Premiership season in which the top three have all won.

items.title: Kris Boyd torches Celtic recruitment and lays into flop signing: 'Wow'
items.description: Celtic signed four players on loan in January and Boyd reckons they were lucky to avoid spending on one in particular.
